name: Slice'n Fry Potato Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds potatoes, peeled, cooked and mashed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the potatoes, egg, onion, salt, and pepper; stir in 3/4 cup of flour.
2. Add enough remaining flour to form a firm dough. Turn onto a lightly floured board; knead for 1 minute.
3. Shape into a 9-inch roll. Cut into 1-inch slices; roll each slice into a 4-inch circle.
4. Fry in a small amount of oil until browned, about 4 minutes per side.
5. Serve with applesauce if desired.
